title: Sass & Belle Grey Pom Pom Basket
features: Lovely addition to your room for easy storage and organisation
Scandi Boho custom design with fluffy pom poms
A lovely addition to a nursery for nappy changing supplies or blankets
description: Make storage chic and fluffy with this Seagrass Grey Pom Pom Storage Basket from our Scandi Boho collection. In natural brown, this woven home decoration makes a delightful addition to any room for easy storage and organisation with charm. A lovely addition to a nursery for those changing supplies or blankets! Or perfect for the living room to create a haven for those loose magazines or arts & crafts supplies!
